description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Compare Study Annotation that runs on push to the master branch. For the oncokb/oncokb-annotator repository, set up a macOS job that checks out the code, installs Python 3.8, and installs dependencies from requirements files. Run flake8 linting, then annotate the msk_impact_2017 study using scripts and compare the results with those from the master branch in the oncokb-data repository.
